title: Starlit Picnic in the Park
content: Pack a cozy blanket, some delicious snacks, and a thermos of hot cocoa. Find a quiet spot in the park, lay back, and gaze at the stars together.
imageAlt: Couple having a picnic under the stars
romanticTip: Choose a night with clear skies for the best stargazing. Bring a star map app to identify constellations together.

title: Pottery Wheel Workshop
content: Get your hands dirty and create something beautiful together. A pottery class is playful, tactile, and gives you a keepsake to remember the day.
imageAlt: Couple working on a shared pottery wheel
romanticTip: Book a private session if possible — having the studio to yourselves makes it much more intimate.

title: Vinyl & Vintage Wine Night
content: Listen to classic records while exploring rare wines in a private lounge. Let the music set the mood as you discover new favorites together.
imageAlt: Cozy lounge with vintage wine and vinyl records
essentials: Vinyl records, Wine selection, Cozy seating
romanticTip: Each pick a record you love and take turns — it's a fun way to share a piece of yourselves.

title: Sunrise Hike
content: Set the alarm early and head out to catch the sunrise from a hilltop. Warm drinks in hand, watch the sky change colors as the world wakes up.
imageAlt: Couple watching a golden sunrise from a hilltop
essentials: Good shoes, Warm layers, Flask of coffee
romanticTip: Check the sunrise time the night before and arrive 20 minutes early to get settled in the best spot.

title: Shared Canvas Workshop
content: Paint one canvas together — no experience needed. Split the canvas down the middle and create your halves, then reveal them at the end.
imageAlt: Two people painting on a shared canvas
romanticTip: Frame the finished canvas together — it becomes a piece of art that's uniquely yours.

title: Sunset Coastline Bike Ride
content: Rent bikes and cruise along the coastline as the sun dips below the horizon. Stop at hidden coves and let the sea breeze do the rest.
imageAlt: Couple cycling along a coastline at sunset
romanticTip: Pack a small snack and stop somewhere scenic to eat — the pause makes the ride feel like an adventure.

title: Chef's Secret Garden Dinner
content: An exclusive multi-course farm-to-table dinner in a private garden setting. Every dish tells a story rooted in local ingredients.
imageAlt: Elegant outdoor garden dinner table setting
romanticTip: Tell the chef it's a special occasion — most will add a personal touch to the experience.

title: Moonlight Stroll & Cocoa
content: A gentle walk through a quiet neighborhood after dark, ending at a cosy café for rich hot chocolate. Simple, unhurried, and deeply romantic.
imageAlt: Couple walking hand in hand at night
romanticTip: Leave your destination open-ended — let the walk take you somewhere unexpected.

title: Agodi Gardens Picnic
content: Escape the city buzz with a quiet afternoon at Agodi Gardens. Walk the canopy, feed the ducks, and lay out a blanket for a scenic picnic.
imageAlt: Lush green botanical garden
romanticTip: Take a walk through the forest walkway and snap some candid photos of each other.

title: Cafe Code & Coffee
content: Grab your laptops and hit a quiet aesthetic café. Wireframe that travel planner project you've been thinking about while splitting a massive pastry.
imageAlt: Two people working on laptops in a cafe
romanticTip: Take a 15-minute break in the middle to completely close your screens, just chat, and share a sweet treat.

title: Late Night Amala Run
content: Skip the fancy reservations. Wait until 9 PM and drive down to the best local spot for steaming hot Amala, ewedu, and assorted meat.
imageAlt: Delicious local Nigerian cuisine
romanticTip: Order something to share, like an extra piece of assorted meat, and feed it to each other.

title: Library Study Date
content: Perfect for when deadlines are looming. Pick a quiet corner in the library, knock out your final year project tasks, and reward yourselves with snacks.
imageAlt: Quiet library aisles
essentials: Study materials, Water bottles, Quiet snacks
romanticTip: Pass sticky notes with sweet or funny messages to each other across the table while studying.

title: Family Arcade Afternoon
content: Bring the little ones along! Spend the afternoon playing air hockey, racing games, and pooling tickets for silly prizes.
imageAlt: Neon lights at an arcade
romanticTip: Team up on the multiplayer games to win enough tickets for a specific prize to give away.

title: At-Home Pizza Making
content: Buy pre-made dough and a bunch of wild toppings. Compete to see who can make the most ridiculous (but delicious) homemade pizza.
imageAlt: Making pizza dough on a kitchen counter
romanticTip: Make heart-shaped pepperonis or arrange the toppings to spell out your initials.

title: Local Art Gallery Tour
content: Spend an afternoon wandering through local art galleries. Pick your favorite pieces and explain to each other why they caught your eye.
imageAlt: People looking at art in a gallery
romanticTip: Play a game where you each pick a painting that reminds you of the other person.

title: Rooftop Mocktails
content: Dress up slightly and head to a rooftop lounge just as the sun sets. Order colorful mocktails and enjoy the city skyline views.
imageAlt: Cocktails on a table with a city view
romanticTip: Time your arrival for 30 minutes before sunset to catch the perfect golden hour lighting.

title: Thrift Store Outfit Challenge
content: Go to a local thrift market. Give each other 20 minutes and a small budget to pick out an outfit for the other person to wear to dinner.
imageAlt: Racks of vintage clothing
essentials: Small budget in cash, Sense of humor
romanticTip: No matter how silly the outfit is, wear it to your dinner date afterward with complete confidence.

title: Kayaking on the Lake
content: Rent a two-person kayak. Work together to paddle out to the center of the lake, pull your paddles in, and just float in the silence.
imageAlt: Kayaking on a calm lake
romanticTip: Once you're in the middle of the lake, stop paddling, lean back, and just enjoy the quiet together.

title: Dessert Crawl
content: Instead of dinner, hit three different spots for dessert. Get a pastry at the first, ice cream at the second, and a slice of cake at the third.
imageAlt: Delicious assorted desserts
romanticTip: Order one dessert at each place and share it so you don't get too full too fast.

title: Indoor Rock Climbing
content: Challenge yourselves physically and mentally at a bouldering gym. Cheer each other on as you figure out the toughest routes.
imageAlt: Indoor rock climbing wall
romanticTip: Cheer each other on and help each other figure out the puzzle of the climbing routes.

title: Farmers Market Morning
content: Grab some reusable bags and wander the morning market. Taste free samples, buy fresh fruit, and pick out flowers for each other.
imageAlt: Fresh produce at a farmers market
romanticTip: Buy a new fruit or vegetable neither of you has tried before and taste it together.

title: Blanket Fort & Movie Marathon
content: Push the couches together, drape blankets everywhere, and build a massive pillow fort. Queue up your favorite film series and hibernate.
imageAlt: Cozy living room setup
romanticTip: String some fairy lights inside the fort to make it feel magical.

title: Cooking Class for Two
content: Book a local cooking class to learn how to make pasta from scratch or roll the perfect sushi. You get to eat your mistakes!
imageAlt: Couple cooking together in a kitchen
romanticTip: Don't stress if it doesn't look perfect. Laughing at your cooking mistakes is half the fun.

title: Sunset Drive to Nowhere
content: Create a killer playlist, roll the windows down, and drive out of the city limits just as the sun is setting. No destination required.
imageAlt: Driving on an open road at sunset
romanticTip: Make a collaborative playlist beforehand with songs that remind you of each other.

title: DIY Escape Room at Home
content: Buy a printable escape room kit online. Print the puzzles, scatter the clues around your living room, and race against the clock to solve it.
imageAlt: Puzzle pieces scattered on a table
romanticTip: Set a fun wager before you start—loser buys coffee the next morning.

title: Local Comedy Club
content: Book a table near the front at a local stand-up comedy spot. Share some appetizers and get ready to laugh until your ribs hurt.
imageAlt: Microphone on a stand on a stage
romanticTip: Sit near the front if you're brave, but don't get mad if the comedian playfully roasts you!

title: Botanical Garden Photography
content: Bring a digital camera or just use your phones. Walk through the lush greenhouses taking moody, artistic portraits of each other.
imageAlt: Lush tropical plants in a greenhouse
romanticTip: Focus on candid shots rather than posed ones; they capture the genuine joy of the date.

title: Jazz Lounge Night
content: Find a dimly lit lounge featuring a live jazz band. Dress up, order something on the rocks, and let the smooth saxophone fill the room.
imageAlt: Jazz musician playing a saxophone
romanticTip: Ask the band to dedicate a song to you, or just enjoy the excuse to sit very close in the dim light.

title: Board Game Cafe
content: Settle into a booth with endless coffee and a massive wall of board games. Try something complex and cooperative, or competitive and fast-paced.
imageAlt: Dice and board game pieces on a table
romanticTip: Play a cooperative game where you have to work together against the board instead of against each other.

title: Street Food Tour
content: Challenge yourselves to only eat things sold on sticks or wrapped in paper. Walk the busiest street and share bites of everything you find.
imageAlt: Grilling street food skewers
romanticTip: Buy one portion of everything to share. It guarantees you'll both get to taste everything without getting stuffed.
